_meta.description: Daily code-health telemetry. One row appended per run. Measured via npm run check / npm run build.
_meta.fields: date, branch_base_sha, main_sha, typecheck_clean, typecheck_errors_branch, typecheck_errors_main, lint_clean, test_pass_count, test_fail_count, build_clean, bundle_largest_chunk_kb, dependency_count, dev_dependency_count, security_advisory_count, notes

history.notes: No lint or test scripts defined in package.json (only check, build, dev, start, db:push). Build is green because esbuild/vite do not typecheck. CI gate (npm run check) is RED on main: 21 errors — server/lib/erp/* adapters (15), authPaymentRoutes.ts (4), Onboarding.tsx (2). Pre-existing; a fix is already open in PR #263 ('TypeScript 21→0'). This branch is a clean +1-commit descendant of main (f824ce0). NOTE: an earlier reading of 319 errors came from a STALE local origin/main ref (c356664); after git fetch, real main = f824ce0 with 21 errors. security_advisory_count not measured (npm audit not run).
